allow: PowerShell(Write-Output "node: $\(node --version\)"; Write-Output "npm: $\(npm --version\)"; try { Write-Output "pnpm: $\(pnpm --version\)" } catch { Write-Output "pnpm: NOT INSTALLED" }; try { Write-Output "corepack: $\(corepack --version\)" } catch { Write-Output "corepack: NOT INSTALLED" }; try { Write-Output "docker: $\(docker --version\)" } catch { Write-Output "docker: NOT INSTALLED" }; Write-Output "---"; Get-ChildItem c:\\MyProjects\\Wodly -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Count)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://registry.npmjs.org/typescript" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; Write-Output "npmjs reachable: HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "npmjs NOT reachable: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
